config_summary:

    General(fixedLeftLocation=True,

            nThreads=4),
    InitialCondition(equivalenceRatio=0.6,

                     xRight=0.006),
    StrainParameters(final=200,
                     initial=200),
    PositionControl(xFinal=0.002,
                    xInitial=0.002),
    Times(profileStepInterval=10,
          regridStepInterval=10),
    TerminationCondition(measurement='dTdt',
                         tEnd=10))
